summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing for MLB Intelligence Warehouse Integration (Fixes 1-3). All core functionality verified: prompt updates aligned with new pipeline, warehouse collections populating correctly, sample-size gates enforced, fail-soft behavior working, and sport isolation maintained.

backend_issues.notes: No critical backend issues found. All 701 pytest tests pass. Backend boot clean.

frontend_issues.notes: Frontend testing not in scope (backend only testing requested)

passed_tests: Backend boot OK - services running without errors
Login endpoint works - demo@valuebet.app/demo1234 returns valid JWT token
Full pytest suite passes - 701/701 tests (678 previous + 23 new test_mlb_intelligence_warehouse.py)
MLB prompt contains new keywords - pressure_base, market_selection, sabermetrics, ghost-edges, historical_pattern_match all present
MLB prompt NO obsolete rules - 'Run Line -1.5 prohibido' and 'UNDER solo con pitchers élite' removed
MLB_INTELLIGENCE_RULES updated - PIPELINE ACTUALIZADO block present with all Phase 13 layers
Prefilter prompt MLB-specific rules - STRUCTURAL_LEAN, REQUIRES_MANUAL_ODDS, no DISCARD for normal motivation or missing odds
mlb_game_intelligence_snapshots collection populated - 6 documents with game_pk, day, digest, pattern_keys
Phase 13 fields present in digest - advanced_stats_snapshot, advanced_adjustments, pressure_base, pressure_base_impact, sabermetrics, sabermetrics_audit, market_selection
Fail-soft behavior validated - lookup_pattern_match(db=None) returns sample_size=0, confidence_adjustment=0.0 without crash
attach_pattern_match_to_payload(db=None) adds historical_pattern_match field with neutral values
Sample-size gates enforced - <20 no adjust (returns 0.0 with warning), 20-49 capped ±5, >=50 with ROI+ capped ±8, negative ROI inverts adjustment
Football prompt isolation - no pressure_base, no sabermetrics, has 'REGLAS DEL DEPORTE (Fútbol)'
Basketball prompt isolation - no pressure_base, no sabermetrics, has 'REGLAS DEL DEPORTE (NBA/Basket)'

derive_pattern_keys() working - correctly identifies LOW_PRESSURE_STRONG_FIP_BOTH, HIGH_HIT_PRESSURE_LOW_RUN_CONVERSION, ERA_UNDERSTATES_RISK, F5_UNDER_BETTER_THAN_FULL_GAME, RUN_LINE_MARGIN_SUPPORTED, MONEYLINE_SAFER_THAN_RUN_LINE, GHOST_EDGE_BLOCKED_PICK
_compute_pattern_adjustment() gates correct - sample_size=10 returns 0.0, sample_size=30 returns ±5 max, sample_size=60 with roi>0 returns up to 8.0

testing_notes.mlb_picks_status: 6 picks generated and moved to rescued bucket (expected behavior - picks without odds go to rescued per MLB-V5 pipeline)
testing_notes.warehouse_status: mlb_game_intelligence_snapshots collection has 6 documents with all Phase 13 fields
testing_notes.pattern_memory_status: Pattern memory collections (mlb_team_daily_profiles, mlb_pitcher_daily_profiles, mlb_pattern_memory, mlb_market_results) remain at 0 documents until feedback loop activates (requires settled bets - out of scope)
testing_notes.prompt_verification: Both analyst_engine.py and mlb_intelligence.py prompts verified to contain new pipeline keywords and exclude obsolete rules
testing_notes.prefilter_verification: Prefilter prompt for baseball correctly implements MLB-specific rules (no DISCARD for normal motivation or missing odds)
testing_notes.fail_soft_verification: All warehouse functions handle db=None gracefully without crashes
testing_notes.sample_size_gates_verification: All three tiers (<20, 20-49, >=50) enforce correct adjustment caps
testing_notes.sport_isolation_verification: Football and basketball prompts confirmed to not contain MLB-specific content
